What makes Sandip University unique?
The university provides hands-on skill development training via industry exposure in a wide range of specialisations.
What kind of training does Sandip University offer?

Sandip University offers subject-wise labs, value addition and global certification programs, incubation cell for entrepreneurship development, international collaborations, and 100% placement assistance.
Why should I choose Sandip University for my education?
Sandip University provides a holistic student experience in the lap of nature with a legacy of success and multiple awards.
What kind of support does Sandip University offer its students?
The university offers compulsory internships, 'Advanced Learner' training & placement program, and SandipTM Incubator Cell for Entrepreneurship Development.
Is Sandip University recognized globally?
Yes, the university has 16+ MoUs with global universities and is ranked highly in various surveys including Times Engineering Survey of 2024.

30th April, 2026
When will the online examination for SU - JEE 2026-27 be conducted?
2nd & 3rd May, 2026
Is there any guarantee of placement after completing a course from Sandip University?
No, but we have a 100% placement assistance policy and 100+ global recruitment partners

10+ days
Can I register for SU - JEE 2026-27 online?
Yes, click here to fill out the registration form
What are the eligibility criteria for international students?
Our university welcomes applications from students who have completed their secondary education and meet our English language proficiency requirements.
How do I apply to your university as an international student?
To apply, please submit your application through our online portal, along with all required documents and supporting materials.
Can I use my country's qualifications to study at your university?
We accept a wide range of international qualifications, so please check our website for specific requirements based on your country of origin.
What is the admission process for international students?
The university follows a standardised admission process for international students, which includes submitting required documents and taking an English proficiency test.
Can I apply to the university if I am from a non-English speaking country?
Yes, you can apply to the university if you are from a non-English speaking country, but you will need to provide proof of English proficiency.
What is the deadline for submitting my application?
The deadline for submitting your application varies depending on the programme and semester you are applying for, so please check the university's website for specific deadlines.
Do I need to submit any additional documents with my application?
Yes, some programmes may require additional documents, such as a portfolio or letters of recommendation, so be sure to check the programme-specific requirements.
Can I apply if I am currently studying abroad and do not have a degree from an Indian institution?
Yes, you can apply to the university even if you are currently studying abroad and do not have a degree from an Indian institution.
What is SU-JEE 2026-27?
SU-JEE 2026-27 is an entrance-cum-scholarship examination conducted by Sandip University to identify & reward outstanding students with merit scholarships.
How do I select my desired date and time for the examination?
Students have to select the desired date and time for the examination when registering for the examination.
What happens if there is a power/technical failure during the examination?
In case of unforeseen circumstances i.e. a power/technical failure, students would be required to appear for the test, second time.
Can I reappear for an examination in case of an emergency?
If a student doesn’t appear for the examination due to an emergency, the student can reappear for the same exam at the next available date.
Do I need to re-register if I want to apply for another stream?
If a student wishes to apply for another stream, they have to re-register by filling out the form.
